name: PER_LEGAL_EMPLOYERS
query: SELECT hao.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID, hao.ORGANIZATION_ID, hao.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, hao.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, hao.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, haotl.NAME, hac.STATUS, hac.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, hac.CREATED_BY, hac.CREATION_DATE, hac.LAST_UPDATED_BY, hac.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, hac.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HR_ORG_UNIT_CLASSIFICATIONS_F hac, HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F hao, HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F_TL haotl WHERE hao.ORGANIZATION_ID = hac.ORGANIZATION_ID AND hao.ORGANIZATION_ID = haotl.ORGANIZATION_ID AND hao.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE BETWEEN hac.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND hac.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND haotl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND haotl.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = hao.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND haotl.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = hao.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND hac.CLASSIFICATION_CODE = 'HCM_LEMP'
